chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-230 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For orders on CMA 677/25 3.For hearing of main case 04-12-2025 None present for the petitioner. **** None present for the petitioner despite issuance of notice of intimation to learned counsel for the petitioner for today’s hearing; no intimation is received. Even on the last date of hearing, none was in attendance on behalf of the petitioner, which reflects that the petitioner and his counsel have lost interest in pursuing this matter. Resultantly, the instant Constitutional Petition along with listed application(s) is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Ahmad
